Regulasi.description: The regulation document being processed. Exactly ONE per document.
example_labels: Undang-Undang tentang Informasi dan Transaksi Elektronik
Peraturan OJK tentang Penyelenggaraan Teknologi Informasi oleh Bank Umum
BAB II TATA KELOLA TI BANK

Bagian.description: A section (Bagian) within a Bab. Only create if explicitly present in the text.

Ayat.description: A sub-article (Ayat) within a Pasal. Only create when text explicitly refers to a specific ayat.

EntitasHukum.description: A legal subject — person, institution, or body explicitly named as a party in a provision.

PerbuatanHukum.description: A specific, concrete legal act that is regulated, prohibited, or required.
example_labels: mendistribusikan informasi yang memiliki muatan penghinaan
menerapkan tata kelola TI yang baik

Sanksi.description: A penalty or sanction. Always include FULL penalty detail (duration + fine). May not exist in all regulation types.
example_labels: pidana penjara paling lama 6 tahun dan/atau denda paling banyak Rp1.000.000.000,00

KonsepHukum.description: A legal concept formally defined in the text (e.g., Pasal 1). NOT for general terms merely mentioned.

MENGATUR.description: An article regulates a legal act

BERLAKU_UNTUK.description: A provision applies to a legal entity

MERUJUK.description: Explicit cross-reference to another article ("sebagaimana dimaksud dalam Pasal X")

MENDEFINISIKAN.description: An article formally defines a concept (typically Pasal 1)
